summary: High‑quality recording captures a late‑tour powerhouse with a smoking Help>Slip>Franklin's and an iconic Iko encore.
review: The show is praised as a strong end‑of‑tour performance, highlighted by a blistering Help > Slip > Franklin's sequence, an unforgettable Iko encore, and the endlessly chanting Not Fade Away. Reviewers also note excellent sound quality with no reported flaws, making it an enjoyable listen despite the unknown source type.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews are strongly positive (4‑5 stars) and emphasize standout performances and good sound quality, yielding a high combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers praise the sound quality and report no issues; source (soundboard/audience) is not specified.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic late‑tour set that builds to a powerful second‑set climax and a concise, classic Iko encore.
